title: WhatsApp Job Group for Criminal Defence Firms | Post Police Station Cover Jobs UK

headings.text: WhatsApp Job Group for Criminal Defence Firms
Need a Police Station Rep in Kent?

content: HomeFirms WhatsApp GroupCriminal Defence Firms & SolicitorsWhatsApp Job Group for Criminal Defence FirmsFor criminal defence firms and solicitors to post urgent and planned police station cover jobs directly to accredited representatives across England & Wales — free, verified, and monitored by a practising solicitorWhat This IsA private WhatsApp group for criminal defence firms to post police station cover jobsAccess limited to verified criminal defence firms onlyMonitored by a practising solicitor to ensure professional standardsConnects firms directly with accredited representatives for urgent and planned coverWhy Access Is ControlledAccess to this group is restricted to genuine criminal defence firms to:•Ensure posted jobs are genuine and legitimate•Protect both firms and accredited representatives•Prevent spam, misuse, and inappropriate content•Maintain professional standards and trust within the networkHow to Request AccessTo request access, please text the following details to:07535 494446Required Information (all mandatory):Full name (of the person requesting access)Firm nameFirm email addressText 07535 494446 to Request AccessVerification ProcessThese details allow us to verify that the request is from a genuine criminal defence firm before granting access to the group.What Happens Next1Your details are checkedWe verify that the request is from a genuine criminal defence firm2You may be contacted if clarification is neededWe may follow up to confirm firm details or ask additional questionsOnce verified, you are added to the WhatsApp groupYou'll receive a WhatsApp invitation to join the groupIf you are unable to text, please email the same details to robertcashman@defencelegalservices.co.ukOperated by Robert Cashman, Duty Solicitor & Higher Rights AdvocateThe WhatsApp group facilitates introductions only. Instruction, supervision, and payment remain the responsibility of the instructing firm.
